summary: Tight first set and a blistering second set with standout blues and Johnny B. Goode, captured on a solid soundboard recording.
review: The concert is praised for its tight playing, fire‑brand guitar work from Jerry (especially the Johnny B. Goode encore) and a rare, powerful Lil Red Rooster blues jam. Recording quality is generally good with clear soundboard detail, though vocals can be a bit loud at times.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer scores and enthusiastic comments indicate an excellent performance; recording is solid but not flawless, yielding a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear soundboard capture with crisp instrument separation; vocals are occasionally overly loud, but overall the mix is listenable and balanced.

standout_songs: Comes A Time > Lost > Saint > Casey Jones
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as tight and well‑played; second set praised for wild blues detours, extended jams and seamless transitions between songs.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as 'out of his mind', destroys the Johnny B. Goode encore and delivers a micro‑blues solo at the end.
band_member_comments.Bob: Two‑guitar front line praised on Lil Red Rooster; vocal delivery noted as strong and straightforward.
